title: Xtra Crisp Japanese Thai Eggplant Inarizushi
description: Smoky and crisp post-workout Japanese dish featuring Thai eggplant, served in a tagine pot, plant-based friendly and in the form of inarizushi.
instructions: Rinse the Thai eggplant and cut it into 1-inch pieces.
In a large bowl, whisk together rice vinegar, sugar, and salt to create the brine.
Add the eggplant pieces to the brine and let it sit for at least 30 minutes to allow for proper soaking.
Preheat the tagine pot over medium heat with sesame oil.
Remove the eggplant from the brine, letting any excess liquid drip off.
Add the eggplant to the tagine pot and cook until it is tender and lightly browned.
Sprinkle smoked paprika over the eggplant for added smokiness.
Prepare the inari pouches according to the package instructions.
Fill each inari pouch with a few pieces of the crispy eggplant.
Serve the inarizushi hot, garnished with additional smoked paprika if desired.
